sglang.title: [Feature] Add EIC as sglang HiCache Storage backend
sglang.author: mss1213
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Description
EIC(Elastic Instant Cache) is a distributed database designed for LLM KV Cache. It supports RDMA, GDR and has the capabilities of distributed disaster tolerance and expansion.
Feature

support both 'page_first' for zero copy  and 'layer_first' for generic copy cache layout.
use load bala

sglang.title: [HiCache] Configurable and Dynamic Prefetch Timeout
sglang.author: ykwd
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

In real-world deployments, timeout serves as a practical prefetch policy. On the one hand, prefetch latency depends on factors such as hardware conditions, the model, and the number of tokens to prefetch. On the other hand, the prefetch deadline is constrained by the SLO. Therefore, allo

sglang.title: Intoduce cpu tensor as metadata to avoid blocking gpu kernel launch
sglang.author: AHEADer
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
We observe some .item() operations in kv cache allocator, which will do cuda sync and block gpu kernel launching and make generation steps slower. We remove these operations by introducing some metadata tensor on cpu.

Modifications

vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fix #25970
When omni is handling the cached video, it will produced mm_kwargs: {'video': [None]}. Then the error will occur when accessing item["use_audio_in_video"].data since item is None
